case_title: CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. SHEILA F FORBES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-02-2023 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-30-2024 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: S. LE; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause Hearing is reset to Jan-30-2024 at 10:30am in Dept 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 21, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to September 12, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
